title: Ryanair’s O’Leary warns European airlines could fail if jet fuel price doesn't fall
summary_full: Ryanair's boss warned that European airlines could see "real failures" if jet fuel prices remain high, having "mushroomed" since the Iran war began.
summary_public: Ryanair's boss warned that European airlines could see "real failures" if jet fuel prices remain high, having "mushroomed" since the Iran war began.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: European airlines could see "real failures" if jet fuel prices remain high
